heroImage.alt: CCA Class of 2026 graduates celebrating at commencement

videoCaption: Relive the highlights from CCA's 119th Commencement

presidentQuote.text: Today we celebrate not just the completion of your degrees, but the beginning of your extraordinary contributions to the world. You leave CCA as artists, designers, architects, and writers — ready to shape the future with creativity and purpose.
presidentQuote.attribution: Tamara Lackey, President, California College of the Arts

downloadableAssets.label: DIY Celebration Kit
downloadableAssets.description: Printable decorations, social media frames, and more

studentSpeaker.name: Maya Chen
studentSpeaker.speechHighlights: Maya spoke about the power of creative communities and how CCA taught her that art is not made in isolation but in conversation with the world around us.

studentSpeaker.name: Alex Kim
studentSpeaker.speechHighlights: Alex reflected on the responsibility architects carry to design spaces that serve all people, drawing on lessons learned through CCA's community-engaged studios.
